goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 canary promotion preview

summary.title: 增加 Catty v0 canary 转正预览
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/memory-canary-promotion.ts 只读 CLI/函数和 focused tests。它复用 evaluateMemoryCanaryQueue 与 catty_memory_canaries 队列，把 pass canary 预览成 AcceptedMemory promotion，并把 fail、insufficient_samples、source_missing 与 admission_failed 统一归入 blocked；README 同步新增入口和边界说明。
summary.why: 前序切片已经能写入 planned canary queue 并只读评估未来 judgement，但 pass 结果还没有进入可审计的 promotion gate。这个 dry-run 预览让 Catty v0 的 provisional memory dogfood 闭环更接近真实转正，同时仍避免把 prediction/judgement 或 canary eval 直接写成用户长期 memory。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 canary promotion preview

decisions.chose: 只做 canary promotion preview，不更新 canary status、不写 catty_memory_audit、不写用户长期 memory、不接 heartbeat。
decisions.rationale: promotion preview 是 pass canary 之后的审计层；真正写 memory 或状态更新需要单独协议和更强证据。

decisions.chose: 复用 evaluateMemoryCanaryQueue 的 pass/fail 口径和 listMemoryCanaryQueue 的 candidate，不重新实现 SQL 聚合或 guardrail 规则。
decisions.rationale: 避免 canary eval 与 promotion preview 出现两套判准；promotion 只解释和包装已经通过的评估结果。

decisions.chose: 重新跑 admitMemoryCandidate，把 candidate 预览成 AcceptedMemory，并输出 promotion reason、future evidence 和 guardrail status。
decisions.rationale: 即使 queued candidate 来自 admission preview，promotion 前仍保留一次 admission gate，防止未来 admission 规则变更后旧队列误转正。

decisions.chose: 把既有 Catty proposed overlaps 视为同一 catty 分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: 这些 intents 分别完成 trail、judge、持久 prediction、日报、candidate、canary queue 和 canary eval；本轮只在其后补 promotion preview，不反向改变核心决策。

rejected.alternative: pass canary 时直接写用户长期 memory
rejected.reason: 会把 dry-run evaluation CLI 变成 memory admission 写通道，跳过 v0 的转正审计边界。

rejected.alternative: 本轮更新 catty_memory_canaries.status 或写 catty_memory_audit
rejected.reason: 状态更新和 audit 写入属于 runner/promotion 协议，和只读 preview 混在一起会制造误导性 side effect。

rejected.alternative: 在 promotion 里重新计算 canary metrics
rejected.reason: 会分叉 canary eval 口径，增加 Goodhart/漂移诊断成本。

acknowledged_constraints.note: memory-canary-promotion 只输出 proposedMemory JSON，不写用户长期 memory。
没有接 launchd heartbeat，也没有新增模型调用路径。
既有 CLAUDE.md dirty 未 stage、未提交；seal 使用 --allow-dirty 记录该边界。

review_notes: TDD RED：bun test src/catty/memory-canary-promotion.test.ts 先失败于缺少 ./memory-canary-promotion 模块。
验证通过：focused promotion test 3 pass，24 expect；canary 相关 tests 11 pass，75 expect；Catty focused tests 31 pass，187 expect。
验证通过：bun test 36 pass，201 expect。
CLI smoke：bun src/catty/memory-canary-promotion.ts --help 输出 usage；live dry-run 返回 totalEvaluations=0 promotable=0 blocked=0。
临时 SQLite CLI smoke：返回 promotable=1、blocked=0、kind=user-prior。
验证通过：git diff --check 与 git diff --cached --check 无输出。
live runtime truth：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 返回 ok=true，heartbeat installed/loaded，state=not running between cycles，last observe ok，last full pipeline ok。
提交 2417751 只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion.ts、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion.test.ts；worktree 仍有既有无关 CLAUDE.md dirty。

subsystems: Catty v0 memory canary promotion preview
architectural_claims: Catty v0 now has a read-only promotion preview layer after canary evaluation and before any real memory write.
Promotion preview reuses canary evaluation guardrails instead of creating a second metric definition.
Pass canaries become proposed AcceptedMemory objects only in JSON output; blocked states keep non-pass and admission-failed cases out of promotion.
The slice preserves the separation between prediction eval, trial heuristic, canary dogfood, and true user-prior memory.
behavioral_changes: bun src/catty/memory-canary-promotion.ts prints a dry-run promotion preview for the live Catty store by default.
--store-db PATH reads a specific SQLite store for canary queue and prediction judgement state.
Pass canaries produce promotions with proposedMemory, promotionReason, evidenceSummary, and guardrailStatus.
Fail, insufficient_samples, source_missing, and admission_failed cases produce blocked entries and no promotions.
Missing Catty canary/prediction tables return an empty preview without creating tables.
security_implications: memory-canary-promotion.ts reads only Catty canary/prediction tables through existing read-only helpers and does not read ~/.agents/memory/config.json, payload_json, API keys, cookies, or provider env vars.
The command performs no model calls and has no --pi path.
The command writes no canary status, no catty_memory_audit, and no user memory.
migration_notes: No schema migration is required; the command reads existing catty_memory_canaries and catty_predictions when present.
Existing memory-canary, memory-canary-eval, candidate, report, and shadow CLIs are unchanged.
